title: Polestar Best First Quarter Ever Q1 2026 Sales Record
text: Polestar reported record first-quarter sales with 13,126 cars delivered globally January through March, 7% increase year over year driven by strong performance in Australia, Germany, Sweden, South Korea and United Kingdom. Revenue increased 56.5% in first half of 2025 primarily due to higher retail sales volumes from transition to active selling model and attractive model line-up. Company benefitted from growing share of higher-priced Polestar 3 and Polestar 4 in product mix. Polestar 3 launched late 2022 while Polestar 4 launched in phases through 2023 and into 2024. Polestar 4 went into production end of 2023 while Polestar 3 started assembly beginning 2024. Increasing dealership network contributed to sales growth with Polestar wanting to reach approximately 250 sales points globally by end of 2026. Despite record volume deliveries, Q1 2026 results revealed profitability challenges with flat revenue year-over-year and significantly widened losses due to tariff impacts and pricing pressures.
